response.text:
REJECT

rationale: Your SoC (15% below threshold) does not meet our minimum sharing threshold of 50%, and our microgrid is under systemic stress with r2c4 critical—we must prioritize own resilience and cannot spare 0.5 kWh.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
You are reacting to a REQUEST from r1c4. Payload: {'kwh': 0.5, 'urgency': 'urgent'}. Their rationale: SoC frac 0.15 below share threshold; requesting energy via geographic circle..
Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.5, distrusted_peers=['r3c4'].
Your latest belief: Islanded microgrid under systemic stress; r2c4 SoC critical (44.5%); peers rejecting transfers; r3c4 asymmetrically protective; geographic round-robin ineffective; must prioritize own resilience and request inbound energy urgently..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
